features: Dove Velvet Glow Body Wash gently cleanses and gives you softer, smoother skin after just one shower
Made with 100% gentle cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, the body cleanser doesn’t strip moisture from your skin but instead replenishes it from within*
This body wash produces a rich lather that effectively washes away impurities and helps renew your skin’s natural moisture
The mild, 92% bio-degradable** shower gel formula protects your microbiome (your skin’s protective layer)
This dermatologically tested body cleanser is made with plant-based moisturisers to leave your skin soft, smooth and cared for
Discover the Dove Body Wash range, PETA-Approved Vegan and packaged in 100% recycled plastic bottles***
description: Product Description If you’re looking for a body cleanser that doesn’t harm your skin but instead cares for it every day, it’s time to try Dove Velvet Glow Body Wash. This mild shower gel blends all the nourishing care you love from Dove in a lightweight formula that leaves your skin softer and smoother after just one shower. Made with 100% gentle cleansers, plant-based moisturisers and 0% sulfate SLES, the moisturising body wash ensures your microbiome (your skin’s living protective layer) is given the nutrients it needs to protect itself and minimise skin dryness. It is also PETA-Approved Vegan and packaged in 100% recycled plastic bottles***. For best results, squeeze the product generously between your palms or onto a shower puff, work into a creamy lather and massage all over your body, then rinse thoroughly. Enjoy skin so nourished and soft, it glows. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, Dove will have helped ¼ billion young people through educational programmes and resources. *within the stratum corneum **92% of ingredients break down into carbon dioxide, water and minerals (OECD test methods 301, 302 or 310) ***bottle excluding cap and label Ingredients Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Carbomer, Glycol Distearate, Caprylyl Glycol, Lauric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Sodium Lauroyl Glycinate, Sodium Isethionate, Palmitic Acid, PPG-6, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Sodium Gluconate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. See more
